node.name: Sorting Algorithms
node.description: Comparison-based sorting including quicksort, mergesort, and their time-space tradeoffs

node.name: Trees
node.description: Hierarchical data structures including binary trees, BSTs, and tree traversal algorithms

node.name: Graph Algorithms
node.description: BFS, DFS, shortest path algorithms, and minimum spanning trees for graph problems
